subcodes.first_line: O Javad! Upon thee be the glory of the Lord of Creation, in the beginning and the return! Blessed art thou and glad tidings unto thee, inasmuch as thou hast mentioned Bahram, upon him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد علیک بهاء مالک الایجاد فی المبدء و المعاد طوبی لک و نعیما لک بما... ذکر بهرام علیه بهائی را
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @fire and light; fire and water
